channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Odisha Governor Fills Long-Vacant Vice-Chancellor Posts in 14 State Universities
item.description: On Monday, Odisha Governor Hari Babu Kambhampati appointed vice-chancellors for 14 state universities, ending long-standing vacancies in higher education leadership. These universities, including Utka...

item.title: Development and agriculture concerns overshadowed by personality politics in Bagalkot bypoll campaign
item.description: As Bagalkot in Karnataka approaches its bypolls, the fortnight-long campaign has largely revolved around personal attacks among political leaders, sidelining key regional issues. Despite the district’...

item.title: Squamish First Nation and Climbers Criticize Volkswagen Beetle Prank on Sacred Rock Face
item.description: A prank involving a red Volkswagen Beetle hanging from the rock face of The Papoose, a popular climbing spot along the Sea to Sky Highway, has sparked strong backlash. The Squamish Nation, who view th...

item.title: Artemis II Astronauts to Break Space Distance Record and Advance Moon Exploration
item.description: Four astronauts aboard NASA’s Artemis II mission don do something no human ever try before — they don fly deeper into space, going past the distance Apollo 13 reach back in 1972. The crew, led by Comm...

item.title: Sha'Carri Richardson wins Stawell Gift with record-breaking run
item.description: American sprinter Sha'Carri Richardson has delivered a stunning performance at the historic Stawell Gift in Victoria, claiming victory in the women’s 120-metre handicap race with a record-breaking tim...

item.title: Iran Denounces US Ultimatum Amid Ongoing Military Escalation
item.description: Tensions between the US and Iran have intensified following a recent rescue operation and a string of military strikes. Iranian authorities claim to have downed multiple US aircraft, including C-130 t...

item.title: Table View police probe shooting of man who intervened in altercation, linked to viral Parklands confrontation video
item.description: Cape Town police are investigating an attempted murder case after a man was shot and wounded in Table View on Friday afternoon. According to SAPS spokesperson Wesley Twigg, the victim was shot in Morn...

item.title: Kenya Met Forecasts Rain and Sunny Intervals Across Select Counties
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department (KMD) has released its 24-hour weather outlook from April 6 to April 7. Residents should expect a mix of sunny intervals and rainfall in different regions. The high...

item.title: Three Michelin-star chefs to host exclusive dinner at City of Dreams Manila
item.description: Three renowned Michelin-starred chefs are set to headline an exclusive six-hands dinner at the luxurious City of Dreams Manila on April 2026. This culinary event promises an unforgettable dining exper...

item.title: Used EV Sales Rise Due to Lease Expirations and Gas Prices
item.description: Sales of new electric vehicles (EVs) have experienced a significant decline in the first quarter of 2026, dropping roughly 28% compared to the same period last year, following the removal of the $7,50...

item.title: Over 15,000 Arrested During Easter Weekend in South Africa Amid Traffic and Crime Incidents
item.description: During the 2026 Easter weekend, South African authorities reported a significant spike in arrests, traffic incidents, and criminal activity. Between Thursday and Saturday, the Road Traffic Management ...

item.title: Kano Governor Abba Yusuf Meets Ex-Governor Shekarau Amid Party Realignments
item.description: On Monday, April 6, 2026, the Governor of Kano State, Abba Yusuf, held a private meeting with former Governor Ibrahim Shekarau. The discussion came at a time of serious political repositioning in Kano...

item.title: Fatal Apartment Fire in San José Caused by Faulty E-bike Battery
item.description: A deadly apartment fire in San José, California, was caused by a malfunctioning lithium-ion battery from an electric bicycle, according to officials from the San José Fire Department. The tragedy occu...

item.title: Netflix Launches 'Netflix Playground' App Featuring Popular Children's Characters
item.description: Netflix has introduced a new gaming app called 'Netflix Playground', aimed at children aged eight and under. The app features games based on beloved children's characters such as Peppa Pig, Dr. Seuss’...

item.title: Impact of New Wage Code on Salaries and Retirement Benefits from April 2026
item.description: Starting from 1st April 2026, the Indian government has implemented major labour reforms under the New Wage Code, affecting how salaried employees are paid across the country. A key change mandates th...

item.title: Concerns Raised Over AI in Environmental Assessments as It Risks Harm to Biodiversity
item.description: Conservationists and scientists have raised alarm over a proposal by the Minerals Council of Australia to trial AI in national environmental assessments. The proposal could potentially lead to failure...

item.title: Understanding the Crisis of the Rules-Based International Order
item.description: The concept of a ‘rules-based international order’ has been facing significant challenges in recent years. Initially, the term emerged to describe a global framework established after the two World Wa...

item.title: Ely Buendia Brings ‘Combo on the Run’ Documentary to North America with Live Performances
item.description: Ely Buendia, the iconic frontman of the legendary Filipino band Eraserheads, will be taking his documentary, ‘Combo on the Run,’ to North America. This documentary, which chronicles the band’s journey...

item.title: Details on US Pilot's Survival and Rescue After F-15 is Shot Down in Iran
item.description: A US fighter pilot was rescued from a mountain in rural Iran after his F-15E Strike Eagle jet was shot down by Iranian forces. The incident marked the first time a US aircraft had been downed by Irani...

item.title: Tamil Nadu court sentences nine police officers to death for 2020 Sathankulam custodial killings
item.description: In a landmark judgment delivered on April 6, 2026, a Tamil Nadu court sentenced nine police officers to death for their role in the 2020 Sathankulam custodial deaths of father and son, P Jayaraj and J...
